title: cistus petiolatus
intro: Cistus petiolatus, also known as Rock Rose or Maritime Cistus, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Cistus petiolatus is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and skincare products.
